questions.prompt: Machine inspected for damaged components, cracks, corrosion, excessive wear, and loose/missing fasteners.
Pins, bolts, fasteners, locking devices, and covers present and properly secured.
All controls operate properly.
Interlocks function correctly.
Controls return to neutral when released.
Control functions are clearly marked.
Visual safety devices operate properly.
Audible safety devices operate properly.
Fiberglass and insulating components free of visible damage.
Insulating components clean and free of contamination.
Operational and instructional markings present and legible.

sections.title: Frequent Inspection - Hydraulic and Pneumatic Systems

questions.prompt: Hydraulic and pneumatic systems show no excessive leakage.
Hydraulic and pneumatic components show no visible deterioration.
Electrical systems related to the aerial device function properly.
Electrical components show no deterioration, dirt accumulation, or moisture.
Stabilizers deploy and operate correctly.
Boom and aerial device functions operate through full range of motion from lower controls.
Emergency stop functions operate correctly.

sections.title: Frequent Inspection - Placards and Test Expiration

questions.prompt: Periodic inspection placard is current.
Electrical test placard is current.
Structural members free of deformation, cracks, or corrosion.
Pins, bearings, shafts, gears, rollers, and locking devices free of excessive wear or distortion.
Chains, sprockets, wire ropes, synthetic ropes, and sheaves free of wear, cracks, or distortion.
Hydraulic and pneumatic relief valves set correctly.
Hydraulic system oil level correct.
Hydraulic and pneumatic hoses and fittings free of leaks.
Hoses and fittings show no abnormal deformation or excessive abrasion.

sections.title: Periodic Inspection - Pumps, Motors, and Generators

questions.prompt: Compressors, pumps, motors, and generators secure and free of leaks.
No unusual noises, vibration, overheating, or loss of operating speed.

sections.title: Periodic Inspection - Hydraulic and Pneumatic Valves

questions.prompt: Hydraulic and pneumatic valves operate correctly.
Valve housings free of cracks and leaks.
Valve spools operate freely and are not sticking.
Vacuum limiting system visually inspected and functioning per manufacturer instructions.

sections.title: Periodic Inspection - Cylinders and Holding Valves

questions.prompt: Hydraulic and pneumatic cylinders operate correctly and show no visible damage.
Holding valves operate correctly.

sections.title: Periodic Inspection - Hydraulic and Pneumatic Filters

questions.prompt: Filters clean and free of contamination.
No foreign material present in the system indicating component deterioration.
Electrical systems and components free of deterioration or excessive wear.
All boom movements operate correctly and smoothly.
Bolts and fasteners tight and secure according to manufacturer recommendations.
Welds inspected and free of cracks or defects.
All identification, operational, and instructional markings present and legible.
Insulating components clean and free of conditions that could compromise insulation.

sections.title: Periodic Inspection - High Resistance Upper Controls

questions.prompt: Upper controls high-resistance components maintained per manufacturer requirements.
